headline.purpose: Section titles and major narrative turns.

shadows.name: featured-media
shadows.purpose: Ambient lift for project imagery and carousels in the active light theme.

shadows.name: featured-media-dark
shadows.purpose: Ambient lift for project imagery and carousels in the active dark theme.

shadows.name: dialog
shadows.purpose: Strongest elevation, reserved for native dialogs.

motion.name: interaction-transition
motion.purpose: Project carousel hover and focus response.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main action used for navigation and contact.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 50px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 15px 38px; color: var(--btn-text, #F4F8F6); background: var(--red-deep, #2A745D); border: 0; border-radius: 2px; font: 700 15px/1 "Satoshi", sans-serif; transition: background .2s, transform .15s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--ink, #303737); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--red, #70C9AA); outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Theme Control
components.description: A compact mono control for secondary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { min-height: 35px; padding: 7px 12px; color: var(--ink-muted, #56615E); background: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--line, rgba(48,55,55,.20)); border-radius: 2px; font: 500 10px/1 "IBM Plex Mono", monospace; letter-spacing: .14em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: var(--red-text, #226D57); border-color: var(--red, #70C9AA); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--red, #70C9AA); outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Operational Chip
components.description: A small category or status label.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; padding: 4px 9px; color: var(--olive, #46534F); border: 1px solid var(--olive, #46534F); border-radius: 2px; font: 600 9px/1 "IBM Plex Mono", monospace; letter-spacing: .18em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Personal Card
components.description: An image-led personal-interest story with deliberate asymmetric corners.
components.html:
EXPERIMENT

Working title

Real context and a concise account of what is being learned.
components.css: .ds-card { overflow: hidden; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 42% 1fr; min-height: 240px; color: var(--ink, #303737); background: var(--card, #EEF3F1); border: 1px solid var(--line, rgba(48,55,55,.20)); border-radius: 58px 8px 38px 8px; } .ds-card-media { background: var(--paper-deep, #BFD5CC); } .ds-card-body { padding: 20px 22px 24px; } .ds-card h3 { margin: 14px 0 8px; font: 700 17px/1.3 "Satoshi", sans-serif; } .ds-card p { color: var(--ink-muted, #56615E); font: 500 14px/1.7 "Satoshi", sans-serif; }

components.name: Contact Select
components.html: <label class="ds-label" for="ds-reason">WHAT WOULD YOU LIKE TO DO?</label><select class="ds-select" id="ds-reason"><option>Suggest something</option><option>Discuss a collaboration</option></select>
components.css: .ds-label { display: block; margin-bottom: 8px; color: var(--ink, #303737); font: 500 10px/1.4 "IBM Plex Mono", monospace; letter-spacing: .14em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-select { min-height: 50px; width: 100%; padding: 0 14px; color: var(--ink, #303737); background: var(--card, #EEF3F1); border: 1px solid var(--line, rgba(48,55,55,.20)); border-radius: 2px; font: 600 14px/1.4 "Satoshi", sans-serif; } .ds-select:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--red, #70C9AA); outline-offset: 4px; }

components.name: Project Carousel
components.description: The signature evidence surface for project imagery and tracker screenshots.
components.css: .ds-carousel { overflow: hidden; margin: 0; color: var(--ink, #303737); background: var(--card, #EEF3F1); border: 1px solid var(--line, rgba(48,55,55,.20)); clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 28px) 0, 100% 28px, 100% 100%, 28px 100%, 0 calc(100% - 28px)); box-shadow: 0 14px 34px rgba(48,55,55,.16); } .ds-carousel-media { min-height: 220px; display: grid; place-items: center; background: var(--paper-deep, #BFD5CC); font: 600 11px/1 "IBM Plex Mono", monospace; letter-spacing: .16em; } .ds-carousel figcaption { padding: 12px 15px; color: var(--ink-muted, #56615E); border-top: 1px solid var(--line, rgba(48,55,55,.20)); font: 400 10px/1.55 "IBM Plex Mono", monospace; letter-spacing: .08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-carousel figcaption b { display: block; color: var(--ink, #303737); } .ds-carousel-controls { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding: 10px 12px; background: var(--paper-deep, #BFD5CC); border-top: 1px solid var(--line, rgba(48,55,55,.20)); font: 500 10px/1 "IBM Plex Mono", monospace; } .ds-carousel-controls button { min-height: 38px; padding: 7px 11px; color: var(--ink, #303737); background: transparent; border: 1px solid var(--line, rgba(48,55,55,.20)); border-radius: 2px; } .ds-carousel-controls button:hover { color: var(--red-text, #226D57); border-color: var(--red-deep, #2A745D); } .ds-carousel-controls button:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--red, #70C9AA); outline-offset: 4px; }

narrative.overview: Olimazi looks like an active working surface: cool graph paper, hand-drawn formulas and diagrams, precise mono annotations, decisive sans-serif headlines, and real project imagery. The visual system supports the locked personal-concept framing and proof over pitch.
keyCharacteristics: Cool mint graph-paper palette with a functional light/dark pair.
Satoshi-led hierarchy, mono operational labels, and handwritten background notation.
Image-first project narratives with visible process and evidence.
Ruled, asymmetric layouts rather than repetitive card grids.
Flat working surfaces with selective lift for featured imagery and dialogs.

rules.name: Paired Theme
rules.body: Any new semantic color must be resolved for both the active light and dark themes before it ships.

rules.name: Existing Tokens
rules.body: Use the CSS custom properties already defined in index.html; do not introduce a parallel palette.

rules.name: Three-Voice
rules.body: Satoshi carries the story, IBM Plex Mono records the evidence, and Architects Daughter stays in the background notation.

rules.name: Evidence Gets Lift
rules.body: Shadows belong to screenshots, imagery, and dialogs—not routine text sections.

dos: Do lead with real screenshots, photographs, artifacts, and traceable context.
Do use the active mint CSS custom properties and preserve both theme variants.
Do keep project narratives image-first and operational details easy to scan.
Do preserve keyboard controls, visible focus, reduced-motion behavior, semantic structure, and alt text.
Do use ruled sections, graph-paper texture, and selective asymmetry to maintain the working-notebook character.
donts: Don't turn Olimazi into a tools platform or finished product company.
Don't make the tracker section resemble a subscription-bookkeeping SaaS sales page.
Don't build a pitch-led AI landing page that substitutes claims for working evidence.
Don't present a polished success story that hides constraints, uncertainty, or unfinished learning.
Don't introduce new colors, fonts, dependencies, decorative gradients, glassmorphism, or repetitive identical card grids without explicit packet scope.
